languages.text: {n}Краем глаза вы замечаете, как Иокаста делает первые шаги в вашу сторону, сжимая шоковую булаву, и в замешательстве останавливается, узнав на вторженце цвета фон Валанциусов.{/n}
{n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Краем глаза вы замечаете, как Иокаста делает первые шаги в вашу сторону, сжимая шоковую булаву, и в замешательстве останавливается, узнав на вторженце цвета фон Валанциусов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Jocasta taking her first steps toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}
{n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Jocasta taking her first steps toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}
{n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Jocasta start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}
{n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Jocasta start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Augenwinkel bemerkst du Sauerback, die mit ihrem Energiestreitkolben in der Hand auf dich zukommt, dann aber verwirrt stehen bleibt, als sie auf dem Eindringling die Farben der Dynastie derer von Valancius erkennt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus dem Augenwinkel bemerkst du Sauerback, die mit ihrem Energiestreitkolben in der Hand auf dich zukommt, dann aber verwirrt stehen bleibt, als sie auf dem Eindringling die Farben der Dynastie derer von Valancius erkennt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du coin de l'œil, vous remarquez Sauerback qui s'approche de vous, électromasse en main, avant de s'arrêter, confuse, en reconnaissant les couleurs de la maison von Valancius que porte l'intrus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du coin de l'œil, vous remarquez Sauerback qui s'approche de vous, électromasse en main, avant de s'arrêter, confuse, en reconnaissant les couleurs de la maison von Valancius que porte l'intrus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Por el rabillo del ojo, ves que Sauerback ha empezado a moverse hacia ti, maza eléctrica en mano, pero se detiene confusa al reconocer los colores de los von Valancius en el intruso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Por el rabillo del ojo, ves que Sauerback ha empezado a moverse hacia ti, maza eléctrica en mano, pero se detiene confusa al reconocer los colores de los von Valancius en el intruso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Göz ucuyla baktığında, Sauerback'in elinde şok tokmağıyla sana doğru hareket etmeye başladığını ama davetsiz misafirin üzerindeki von Valancius renklerini fark edince şaşkınlıkla durduğunu fark ediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Göz ucuyla baktığında, Sauerback'in elinde şok tokmağıyla sana doğru hareket etmeye başladığını ama davetsiz misafirin üzerindeki von Valancius renklerini fark edince şaşkınlıkla durduğunu fark ediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的余光瞥见苏尔贝克正朝你走来，手里提着电击战锤。可一认出闯入者身上冯·瓦兰修斯家的配色，她便困惑地停了下来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的余光瞥见苏尔贝克正朝你走来，手里提着电击战锤。可一认出闯入者身上冯·瓦兰修斯家的配色，她便困惑地停了下来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}サウアーバックがあなたに向かって、ショックマウルを手に動き始めたことに気づいた。しかし、侵入者の服装がフォン・ヴァランシウスのものだと気づくと、彼女は混乱して動きを止めた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}サウアーバックがあなたに向かって、ショックマウルを手に動き始めたことに気づいた。しかし、侵入者の服装がフォン・ヴァランシウスのものだと気づくと、彼女は混乱して動きを止めた。{/n}
